title: Square Footage Calculator - Room & Area
description: Free square footage calculator. Calculate the area of rooms, floors, walls, and irregular shapes. Perfect for home improvement and real estate.
keywords: square footage calculator, area calculator, room size calculator, floor area, square feet calculator
intro: Calculate the square footage of any rectangular space. Enter length and width to get the area in square feet or square meters.

faq.q: How do I calculate square footage?
faq.a: Square footage = Length × Width. For example, a 12ft × 15ft room = 180 square feet.

faq.q: How do I convert square feet to square meters?
faq.a: Multiply square feet by 0.0929. For example, 200 sq ft × 0.0929 = 18.58 sq m.

faq.q: How do I calculate irregular shapes?
faq.a: Break the area into rectangles, calculate each one separately, then add them together.
